title: Topic Analysis Schema
description: Schema for validating the 01-topic structured block

title_candidates.description: At least 3 high-quality title candidates with hook types

feasibility.description: Whether AI can actually achieve this scene

operation_layer.description: What the user will do (the mechanics of the demo)

judgment_layer.description: The decision-making layer, constraints, and boundaries

ai_limitations.description: What the AI *cannot* do or where it will fail in this demo
